hero.description: We embed agentic AI productivity directly into the heart of your business. Strategy, autonomous agents and workflows that work for your company — not next to it.
hero.orbit_caption: Agent orchestration, automation and AI deployment in one strategic layer.

manifesto.heading: We rethink business processes with agentic AI, inside the company.
manifesto.body: At CAIS we combine strategic vision and high-level technical expertise. We design agents, automations and secure infrastructure that integrate with your systems and operate on your data — to deliver real, measurable competitive edge.

openclaw.label: OPENCLAW
openclaw.headline: We turn OpenClaw into specialized agents for your business
openclaw.description: OpenClaw is an advanced open-source framework for building AI agents. CAIS adopts it as a foundational platform to develop vertical, tailor-made agents — integrating proprietary tools and configuring workflows that solve real business problems.
openclaw.feature1_desc: We start from OpenClaw and transform it into vertical agents for your industry: finance, logistics, healthcare, manufacturing. Every agent is customized to your processes.
openclaw.feature2_desc: We connect OpenClaw to your internal systems — ERP, CRM, databases, internal APIs. The agent works directly on your data and business tools, without disruption.
openclaw.feature3_desc: We design intelligent workflows that orchestrate multiple agents in sequence. From data analysis to execution, all autonomously.
openclaw.feature4_desc: We monitor agent performance in real time, optimize prompts and refine behavior for ever-improving results.

hermes.label: HERMES AGENT
hermes.headline: Autonomous agents that learn and grow with your business
hermes.description: HERMES is an advanced multi-agent platform integrating self-improvement, persistent memory and intelligent orchestration. CAIS manages it with Python expertise, building systems that autonomously improve through real-world use.
hermes.feature1_desc: HERMES agents analyze their own results, identify success patterns and autonomously optimize their strategies. Every execution is an opportunity to improve.
hermes.feature2_desc: With ChromaDB and Obsidian, every agent retains long-term memory of interactions, decisions and outcomes. It never starts from scratch: every conversation builds on the past.
hermes.feature3_desc: Multiple specialized agents work in parallel and collaborate in sequence. Each has a precise role, and HERMES coordinates information and task handoffs between them.
hermes.feature4_desc: Our Python engineering team manages HERMES's entire lifecycle: custom development, VPS deployment, system integration, continuous monitoring and evolutionary maintenance.

automation.label: AUTOMATION
automation.headline: We eliminate repetitive activities to free your team
automation.description: Every day your employees lose hours on repetitive manual tasks. CAIS analyzes, designs and implements custom automation solutions that give your team time back — to focus on decisions that matter.
automation.task1_desc: Automatic data extraction from invoices, contracts and documents. Classification, archiving and approval workflows fully automated.
automation.task2_desc: Intelligent automatic email responses, automatic ticket routing, proactive notifications and periodic reports generated and distributed automatically.
automation.task3_desc: Data extraction from heterogeneous sources, automatic CRM and ERP population, dashboards updated in real time with custom KPIs.
automation.task4_desc: Automated onboarding, leave and permit management, automatic timesheets, contractual deadline notifications and document compliance.

python.label: PYTHON & AI
python.headline: Intelligent applications built with Python and integrated AI
python.description: Our team of software engineers specialized in Python develops enterprise applications with integrated artificial intelligence. From RESTful APIs to complete platforms, every solution is built with the most advanced, production-ready technologies.
python.feature1_desc: Scalable architectures with FastAPI, Django and containerized microservices. Production-ready code with automated testing and integrated CI/CD.
python.feature2_desc: Native integration of LLM models (GPT-4, Claude, Llama), RAG systems with ChromaDB, computer vision with PyTorch and advanced NLP with LangChain.
python.feature3_desc: Complete applications from frontend (React, TypeScript) to backend (Python, PostgreSQL), deploy on VPS with Docker, advanced monitoring and logging.
python.feature4_desc: OAuth2/JWT authentication, data encryption, penetration testing, GDPR compliance. Protected infrastructure with TailScale, UFW and Fail2Ban.

showcase.title: The competencies we embed into your systems.
showcase.body: Behind every agent is a proven stack: AI, security, data, automation. Three areas, one unified vision — your AI in production.
showcase.card1_desc: Autonomous agents, RAG systems, predictive models, advanced NLP. We put AI where your business needs it.
showcase.card2_desc: Zero-trust architectures, private VPNs, firewalls, intrusion monitoring. Security by design, not after.
showcase.card3_desc: Vector databases, long-term memory, knowledge graphs. Your data becomes actionable knowledge.

services.heading: Excellence services
services.subheading: We offer end-to-end solutions for the digital transformation of your business.
services.card1_desc: Custom AI agents that automate complex workflows, reducing operational time by 70%.
services.card2_desc: Modern web applications, scalable APIs and bespoke digital platforms for business needs.
services.card3_desc: VPS configuration, local deployment, containerization and continuous monitoring for maximum reliability.

contact.heading: Start the transformation
contact.body: Reach out for a free strategic consultation. We will analyze your needs and design a tailor-made AI roadmap.
contact.success_body: We will contact you within 24 hours.
contact.error_name: Name must be at least 2 characters
contact.error_email: Please enter a valid email address
contact.error_message: Message must be at least 10 characters
contact.error_network: Network error. Please try again in a moment.
